calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via Zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA"), Personal Representative.

The court notes its concerns regarding whether the search for heirs up to this point has been adequate. Ms. Mannion offers advocacy regarding the efforts made by the heir search companies since the instant petition was filed at the end of December 2021 and believes that the heir search companies would have found additional heirs by now.

After additional discussion, the court summarizes Ms. Mannion's testimony and takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
